author: tbenr
content: I'm not even sure we support it correctly independently from 7688

author: etan_status
content: yeah gloas genesis is a bit tricky, it changed a couple times over the recent months

author: etan_status
content:
<@808969530608451584> <@534934855113506836> <@818245058541125662> <@504202741933932544> <@833706406699073536>, have integrated the feedback about making some more of the Gloas types progressive: 
- (1) PayloadAttestation, (2) IndexedPayloadAttestation, to align with the regular Attestation which evolved over time
- (3) ExecutionPayloadBid, (4) ExecutionPayloadEnvelope, to align with the other top level containers, which evolve frequently
- (5) EXECUTION_BLOCK_HASH_GINDEX_GLOAS light client protocol constant also got a new value as its inside the bid

Tests https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/pull/4630#issuecomment-4352744403
Kurtosis https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/pull/4630#issuecomment-4377125436 (it's on gloas_fork_epoch=1, set to =0 locally to test genesis)

and for <@592004585506340885>'s feedback I opened https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/pull/5402 (BUILDER_INDEX_FLAG from 2^40 to 2^63)

author: etan_status
content: would also appreciate giving the specs an "approve" once you think it's good. we should merge it soon so that alpha.x release can happen to give enough time to get ready for devnet 7

author: etan_status
content: the one open q I have is if PTC_SIZE is intended to evolve over time. or is it a fixed size similar to the sync committee that never changes

author: etan_status
content: if it evolves, it should be ProgressiveBitlist instead of Bitvector
